headline: Top Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership May 2026
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has risen 1.1%, contributing to an impressive 27% increase over the past year, with earnings forecasted to grow by 17% annually. In this thriving environment, growth companies with high insider ownership can be particularly appealing as they often indicate strong confidence from those who know the business best and align management interests with shareholder value.
